pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 1

readAloudText.Wonder: Momo Puffin finds a pillow rolling slowly down Pillow Hill.
readAloudText.Explore: Momo Puffin saw a pillow roll down the hill. Plump, soft, slow. Bump. Bump. Bump.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 2

readAloudText.Wonder: Bibi Bunny catches the pillow with both soft paws.
readAloudText.Explore: Bibi Bunny opened her paws wide. The pillow rolled right in. “Got you,” she giggled.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 3

readAloudText.Wonder: Tula Turtle notices more pillows waiting at the top like sleepy clouds.
readAloudText.Explore: Tula Turtle looked up. More pillows sat on the hill like little clouds waiting for bedtime.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 4

readAloudText.Wonder: The friends decide to make a slow pillow parade to the cozy nest.
readAloudText.Explore: “Parade,” said Momo. “Slow parade,” said Tula. Bibi hugged the first pillow close.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 5

readAloudText.Wonder: Momo carries the dotty pillow with tiny careful puffin steps.
readAloudText.Explore: Momo carried the dotty pillow. His feet went pat-pat-pat, soft as rain on a blanket.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 6

readAloudText.Wonder: Bibi bounces beside a star pillow, then remembers to bounce softly.
readAloudText.Explore: Bibi wanted to bounce high. Then she remembered sleepy pillows like soft bounces, so she made tiny hop-hop-hops.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 7

readAloudText.Wonder: Tula carries one pillow on her shell like a little moon.
readAloudText.Explore: Tula put a round pillow on her shell. It looked like a moon riding slowly across the grass.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 8

readAloudText.Wonder: A pillow tumbles into flowers, and the friends lift it out gently.
readAloudText.Explore: One pillow rolled into sleepy flowers. Momo lifted one side, Bibi lifted the other, and Tula brushed away petals.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 9

readAloudText.Wonder: The parade grows longer with pillows of dots, moons, and soft stripes.
readAloudText.Explore: Dot pillow, moon pillow, stripe pillow, cloud pillow. The parade wiggled down the hill in a very quiet line.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 10

readAloudText.Wonder: Momo sings a tiny marching song that gets slower each time.
readAloudText.Explore: Momo sang, “Pillow, pillow, slow.” Then slower. “Pillow... pillow... slow.” Everyone’s feet slowed too.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 11

readAloudText.Wonder: Bibi makes a soft pillow gate for everyone to pass through.
readAloudText.Explore: Bibi stood two pillows together. Momo waddled under. Tula crawled under. Even the moon pillow seemed to smile.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 12

readAloudText.Wonder: Tula finds the perfect round nest shape at the bottom of the hill.
readAloudText.Explore: At the bottom, Tula drew a slow circle in the grass. “Here,” she said. “A nest shape.”

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 13

readAloudText.Drift: They stack a cozy pillow hill.
readAloudText.Wonder: The friends stack pillows into a cozy hill that is just the right height.
readAloudText.Explore: They stacked pillows softly. Not tall. Not wobbly. Just right for leaning, snuggling, and sighing.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 14

readAloudText.Wonder: Momo, Bibi, and Tula each choose one pillow for their sleepy head.
readAloudText.Explore: Momo chose dots. Bibi chose stars. Tula chose the round moon pillow and smiled into its soft middle.

pages.illustrationAlt: Text-free illustration for The Pillow Hill Parade, page 15

readAloudText.Wonder: The pillow parade becomes a quiet pillow nest under the stars.
readAloudText.Explore: The parade was over. The nest was ready. Under the stars, three friends rested on Pillow Hill, soft and still.
